title: InMemoryChannel.send_datagram silently drops if no loop
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/transport.py:87-89

send_datagram calls asyncio.get_running_loop() without try/except:
```python
def send_datagram(self, data: bytes, dest: str) -> None:
    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
    loop.call_soon(self._network._deliver, self._host, dest, data)
```

If called outside an event loop (e.g., during setup or cleanup), this raises RuntimeError. Unlike other transport operations that are expected to be async, send_datagram appears sync but requires a running loop.

This could cause confusing errors during testing or initialization.

Fix: Document the requirement clearly, or use asyncio.get_event_loop() with DeprecationWarning handling for broader compatibility.
